text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the CBC Sho arrives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O, after an intensive
concentration session in the waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Departs for the track, carrying the momentum
over from her last race!
